ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
Language: c%23
OpenDeepWiki is the open-source version of the DeepWiki project, aiming to provide a powerful knowledge management and collaboration platform. The project is mainly developed using C# and TypeScript, supporting modular design, and is easy to expand and customize.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BepInEx/BepInEx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx
Language: c%23
Unity / XNA game patcher and plugin framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cysharp/UniTask
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cysharp/UniTask
Language: c%23
Provides an efficient allocation free async/await integration for Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Facepunch/sbox-public
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Facepunch/sbox-public
Language: c%23
s&box is a modern game engine, built on Valve's Source 2 and the latest .NET technology, it provides a modern intuitive editor for creating games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
Language: c%23
🔍 Quick file search & app launcher for Windows with community-made plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Humanizr/Humanizer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Humanizr/Humanizer
Language: c%23
Humanizer meets all your .NET needs for manipulating and displaying strings, enums, dates, times, timespans, numbers and quantities

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PhoenixNil/XrayUI-dev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PhoenixNil/XrayUI-dev
Language: c%23
Lightweight native Windows GUI client for Xray core, built with WinUI 3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: STranslate/STranslate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/STranslate/STranslate
Language: c%23
A ready-to-go translation ocr tool developed with WPF/WPF 开发的一款即用即走的翻译、OCR工具

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ShareX/ShareX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ShareX/ShareX
Language: c%23
ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
Language: c%23
A Launcher that Downloads and Updates Applications from Github Releases

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StockSharp/StockSharp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StockSharp/StockSharp
Language: c%23
Algorithmic trading and quantitative trading open source platform to develop trading robots (stock markets, forex, crypto, bitcoins, and options).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
Language: c%23
Downloads videos and playlists from YouTube

ns0:entry.ns0:title: babalae/better-genshin-impact
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/babalae/better-genshin-impact
Language: c%23
📦BetterGI · 更好的原神 - 自动拾取 | 自动剧情 | 全自动钓鱼(AI) | 全自动七圣召唤 | 自动伐木 | 自动刷本 | 自动采集/挖矿/锄地 | 一条龙 | 全连音游 | 自动烹饪 - UI Automation Testing Tools For Genshin Impact

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
